Class XReportDAO.HourlyRow

java.lang.Object
com.project.dao.XReportDAO.HourlyRow
Enclosing class:
XReportDAO
public static class XReportDAO.HourlyRow extends Object
Represents a row of hourly sales data for X-report display.

This class contains aggregated sales information for a specific hour, including order count, total sales, and breakdown by payment method.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    final Map<String,Double>
    byPaymentMethod
    A breakdown of sales amounts by payment method for this hour.
    final String
    hour
    The hour label, e.g., '9:00 AM'.
    final int
    orderCount
    The total number of orders placed in this hour.
    final double
    totalSales
    The total sales amount for this hour.
